message:
fix: forceCloseDescendants returns error to prevent orphaned wisp children (gt-7lx3)

forceCloseDescendants was fire-and-forget (void return), so patrol_report
closed the parent even when child closes failed (e.g. Dolt hiccup).
This left orphaned wisp children -- 50 found across 5 patrol epics.

Changes:
- closeDescendantsImpl now returns (int, error) and collects errors via
  errors.Join instead of silently swallowing them
- forceCloseDescendants returns (int, error); patrol_report aborts if
  descendants cannot be closed, so patrol retries next cycle
- closeDescendants (non-force) preserves existing behavior: logs warnings,
  returns count only -- used in burn/squash where proceeding is correct
- Updated 4 other callers (handoff, sling_helpers, polecat nuke) to
  handle the new return type with best-effort logging

Filed bd-8qc5 for the latent beads-repo bug: getChildrenOfIssues
hardcodes dependencies table, missing wisp_dependencies.
